rulings.Case Title: NORMA ANN MULLIGAN VS. LIVERPOOL LIL'S INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Refile 1st Amended Cross-Complaint / Notice Of Motion For Leave To Re-File First Amended Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for AUG 16, 2018 line 1. DEFENDANTs LIVERPOOL LIL'S INC. and GILBERT "GIL" HODGES's MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Refile 1st Amended Cross-Complaint GRANTED. Trial is continued to April 1, 2019. All pre-trial deadlines are continued accordingly for the new claims in the First Amended Cross-Complaint. Cross-Complainant to compensate new cross-defendants for all discovery expenses incurred due to the new allegations. All payments to be made within 10 days of receipt of the invoice. Expenses to be at reasonable rates for reasonable work performed in defending (discovery-related) causes of action alleged in First Amended Cross- Complaint. First Amended Cross-Complaint to be filed and served by 4:00 p.m. on August 17, 2018. Proof of Service to be filed by 4:00 p.m. on August 20, 2018. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Allow Limited Discovery Pursuant To California Code Of Civil Procedure Section 425.16g

rulings.Case Title: PARK LANE ASSOCIATES, LP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. JOSEPH ALIOTO, AN INDIVIDUAL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Post Judgment And Appellate Attorneys Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for AUG 16, 2018 line 4. PLAINTIFF PARK LANE ASSOCIATES, LP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED's Motion For Post Judgment And Appellate Attorneys Fees GRANTED in the amount of $44,736.50 (deductions made for entries not related to enforcement of settlement) under the loadstar method (reasonable hours spend on enforcement of the settlement agreement multiplied by reasonable hourly rate). The contract and the attorney's fees clause therein is enforceable: nothing (1) on the face of the contract and/or (2) in the agreement between that parties to resolve their differences regarding construction at the property in exchange for resolution of the underlying matter, is illegal or void as against public policy. (SEE RE-HEARING DECISION). Request for post-judgment fees (unrelated to enforcement of judgment) is timely. = (501/REQ)
